description_long: This bungalow features a low, horizontal profile with a combination of hip and gable roof sections finished in dark material. The structure is primarily white with large, flat exterior walls and a prominent driveway leading to a detached garage. The main building is complemented by a fenced backyard area, which includes a small pool or water feature. Windows are distributed along the sides and rear, with a covered entryway at the front. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall, enhancing privacy and separation from the street.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a dark hip roof, detached garage, driveway, and fenced backyard featuring a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and large windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the roof layout, fenced yard, and spatial arrangement of the garage and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
